description: segment a timeline JSON into sessions on idle gaps, then cluster sessions by app-signature
rules: read-only / pure — no network, stdlib only
segment_sessions splits on idle gaps (default 10 min) and drops sessions shorter than min (default 5 min)
cluster_sessions groups sessions sharing an app-signature and keeps clusters of size >= min_cluster_size (default 2)
ts strings are normalized to epoch seconds before segmentation
clusters written to record_store as clusters.json
usage: Set INPUT (redacted timeline JSON). Optional: IDLE_GAP_MINUTES, MIN_SESSION_MINUTES, MIN_CLUSTER_SIZE. Output: clusters.json.
limitation: Clusters by exact ordered app-signature only; no fuzzy app grouping. Window-title text is summarized, not analyzed.
